g.text: Why GraphQL Exists -- the REST pains it removes
3 round trips and 45 wasted fields collapse to 1 round trip with 6 tight fields.
REST -- 3 round trips, mostly wasted bytes
Mobile profile screen needs: name, avatar, last 3 post titles, comment counts
Total: 3 RTT x 200ms = 600 ms Used 6 / 45 fields (13%)
Client describes the shape; server returns precisely that.
Response (6 fields -- exactly what was asked)
Total: 1 RTT x 200ms = 200 ms Used 6 / 6 fields (100%)
